title: lomatium pastorale
intro: Lomatium pastorale, also known as Cream Fennel or Western Lomatium, is a perennial plant native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its rich medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and bronchitis. Lomatium pastorale can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, allowing for various forms of herbal use to harness its medicinal properties.
